student_verification.name: student
student_verification.declaration: I used Claude to help structure the four sections of task 1.3. The reasoning in section 4 (condition where paper wouldn't outperform baseline) is based on my own understanding of the learning curve in Figure 2 and the fixed-resource limitations of the method.

interactions.prompt: great now lets proceed for task 1.3
interactions.response_summary: Generated all four sections: named the unigram SVM baseline, explained its limitation as opaque token features, described how Senti-features and tree kernel overcome it, and gave a reasoned inference about when the baseline would win at large data scales.

interactions.prompt: does it matches to the rubrics given? or any changes required
interactions.response_summary: Checked each rubric point, found section 2 slightly over-written for a 2-mark question, trimmed it to two tight bullets.

interactions.prompt: oh ohk btw what limitation of that baseline the paper identifies and how did the proposed method overcomes it
interactions.response_summary: Explained the limitation (opaque tokens, no semantics) and how the method overcomes it (encoding what words mean vs which words appear) in plain language.
